marketsSection.title: Trade The World's
marketsSection.description: Access cryptocurrencies, forex, commodities and major indices through Orion Trade Hub's institutional-grade trading platform. Monitor price movements in real time and execute trades with confidence.

header.title: Everything You Need
header.description: Orion Trade Hub combines institutional execution, AI-powered insights, advanced portfolio management, multi-asset trading and enterprise-grade security into one premium trading experience.

vip.title: VIP Accounts
vip.description: Premium execution, institutional pricing and dedicated relationship managers.

ai.title: AI Insights
ai.description: Real-time market intelligence powered by advanced trading algorithms.

execution.title: Fast Execution
execution.description: Ultra-low latency infrastructure for rapid order execution worldwide.

security.title: Secure Platform
security.description: Enterprise-grade encryption and multi-layer account protection.

assets.title: Multi-Asset Trading
assets.description: Trade crypto, forex, commodities, indices and equities from one account.

portfolio.title: Managed Portfolios
portfolio.description: Professional portfolio management with institutional risk controls.

securityMobile.title: Security & Mobile Platform
securityMobile.description: Orion Trade Hub is built with institutional-grade security, encrypted infrastructure, and real-time risk monitoring systems. Your funds and data are protected with multi-layer safeguards.

hero.title: Institutional Trading
hero.subtitle: Experience institutional-grade execution across Crypto, Forex, Commodities and Global Equities through one beautifully engineered trading platform.

mobile.label: MOBILE PLATFORM
mobile.title: Trade Anywhere.

coin.title: Orion
